overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character traversing a foggy, rain-soaked industrial harbor district at night. The character walks past brick warehouses and freight train cars, crosses railroad tracks, and proceeds onto a wooden waterfront pier illuminated by warm gas lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley between brick warehouses

events.description: character turns left at the corner of the brick warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy industrial street, turning left at the warehouse corner

entered.detail: large multi-story brick industrial building with rows of illuminated windows
building facade decorated with warm string lights
wet muddy ground reflecting the warm lamplight
metal fence running alongside the warehouse

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, rain-soaked industrial alley flanked by a large brick warehouse on the left and buildings with decorative string lights on the right. The muddy ground reflects the warm glow of gas lamps as the character turns left at the warehouse corner.

events.description: passes through stone gate pillars into the open freight yard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the freight yard, passing parked train boxcars on the left

entered.detail: wooden freight train boxcars with graffiti parked on sidings
brick industrial building with large painted sign reading FOOD CANNERY
ornate stone pillars marking the entrance to the yard
parked wooden cargo wagon with large wheels

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a freight yard where wooden boxcars sit on sidings to the left. The character walks past stone gate pillars toward a large brick cannery building on the right, with the warehouse receding into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad crossing transitioning to wooden pier

events.description: crosses from muddy ground onto wooden pier planks, leaving the street for the dock

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and stepping onto the wooden waterfront pier

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks crossing the muddy ground
weathered wooden planks of the waterfront pier
low wooden warehouse structure on the pier with glowing windows
wooden safety railing along the edge of the pier

segments.scene_description: The character passes the cannery building and crosses railroad tracks before stepping onto a wooden pier. The ground transitions from mud to weathered planks as a low wooden warehouse building comes into view ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier toward the harbor, passing a warning sign

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign reading NO SMOKING ON WHARVES AND LANDINGS
dark water of the harbor visible beyond the wooden railing
faint lights from distant ships or harbor structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open wooden pier with the harbor water visible to the left beyond the railing. A prominent No Smoking sign stands on the right as the character proceeds toward the distant harbor lights under the dark rainy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial district that gradually opens from a narrow alley into a wide waterfront pier. It begins by following the character through a muddy alley flanked by a brick warehouse and decorative string lights, with the ground reflecting the warm glow of gas lamps as the camera turns a corner. The scene then expands into a freight yard, moving past wooden boxcars and stone gate pillars toward a large brick cannery. As the character passes the cannery and crosses a set of railroad tracks, the terrain shifts from mud to weathered wooden planks. Finally, the camera proceeds along the open pier with the harbor water visible to the left, passing a prominent No Smoking sign while heading toward distant lights under a dark, rainy sky.
